name: Roger Misso
subject: Taking deliberate action to end racism in politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Yesterday was Martin Luther King Day, a time to remember the legacy of Dr. King and pledge to continue his work. So we're asking: do your actions today match your words from yesterday?

Ending systemic racism requires more than just speaking words. It takes [deliberate action](https://act.myngp.com/el/_0hnbUnSqMsVZ0IlfBVw5rDyGXIQtFL2z2Q692QJKSs=/1AFiinQclZOF8ReL6EuhXQG990acj_ZNhliKpQcf9vE=) as private citizens, workplace leaders, and government officials.

That is why we are proud to announce our support for [The Collective PAC](https://act.myngp.com/el/_0hnbUnSqMsVZ0IlfBVw5rDyGXIQtFL2z2Q692QJKSs=/JJ-MyUCJ1sPvbkzvgQTvJk0vPBdqv9X88kzxuJhH33A=), a group of change-makers working to build Black political power in America. From candidates to campaign staffs, Black voices are underrepresented in America. The Collective PAC aims to change that by providing training, funding, and support to Black candidates and their staffs. And we've got their backs.

[**Every dollar you donate for the next 24 hours will be matched 100% to The Collective PAC. Will you help us raise at least $5,000 to end racism in our politics and elect more Black leaders of integrity to Congress?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_0hnbUnSqMsVZ0IlfBVw5rDyGXIQtFL2z2Q692QJKSs=/1AFiinQclZOF8ReL6EuhXQG990acj_ZNhliKpQcf9vE=)
Thank you for joining us in this important work. May we live the legacy of Dr. King by continuing his work today, tomorrow, and every day.
In solidarity,
Roger
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_0hnbUnSqMsVZ0IlfBVw5rDyGXIQtFL2z2Q692QJKSs=/1AFiinQclZOF8ReL6EuhXQG990acj_ZNhliKpQcf9vE=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
https://eugeneforcongress.com/ [https://eugeneforcongress.com/]
Friend,
Today is my final day serving as your Auditor General. The past 8 years have been the honor of my professional life and I am proud of how much we accomplished together.
Over these two terms, our work led to meaningful reforms, from increased accountability for education funding so funds meant for teaching our children actually go to teaching our children, ending pharmacy "gag clauses" which will lower the cost of prescription drugs across our Commonwealth, to ending Pennsylvania's rape kit backlog which has led to justice for countless survivors and their families. Because of the work we have done, Pennsylvania is a safer, fairer, more equal place and I could not be more thankful for the support you gave me and my staff along the way.
I am also grateful that while my time as your watchdog has come to a close, I will be succeeded by someone I trust will uphold the standards I have sought to live up to during my tenure, Tim DeFoor. He has my full faith and confidence and I ask that you give him yours as well.
Thank you for the trust you put in me over these years, words cannot describe how much it's meant.
Until the next adventure,
Eugene

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/75177/images/unnamed.jpg]

| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

Happy New Year! I hope you are doing well and staying healthy and safe.

As we all watched with horror what took place on January 6th in our nation’s capital, I am saddened that these images will be forever seared in our memories and are now part of our country’s history. Five people senselessly lost their lives that day, one of whom was a Capitol Police Officer.

I have authored two opinion editorials, one on the topic of the Jan 6 protests on the Capitol, published in The Washington Times, and another on the Big Tech censorship of a sitting president and millions of conservative voices, published in the Tampa Bay Times. Click the logos below to access the articles.

1. **The Washington Times on January 12, titled, ‘Where was the Democrats' outrage during the riots, looting and vandalism of the summer of 2020?’ **

[](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=b5091523cf&e=c2296cffff)

1. **The Tampa Bay Times on January 18, titled, ‘In censoring conservatives, Big-Tech is acting like Iran or North Korea’. **

[](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=5e77684922&e=c2296cffff)

1. **On Fox News yesterday, I debated the dangers of Joe Biden’s immigration plan with their Democrat strategist:**

[](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=73acd66ec7&e=c2296cffff)

I would love to hear from you, so please do keep in touch.

To see my television appearances on a variety of political topics, please follow me on:
Facebook: Amanda Makki for Congress
Instagram: amandamakki
Twitter: @amandamakki

Thank you!
Amanda Makki

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I just filed with the Supreme Court
body:
As you’ve probably seen, conservatives, including President Trump are being banned on all social media sites. I’ve been fighting back against Big Tech for years, and earlier this month, working with my attorney, Larry Klayman, I filed a petition with the United States Supreme Court over Big Tech discrimination and violations of anti-trust law.
| | | | Friend,

[](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-409985-963939-5396773-4de7c21d11-7fa8767a05) I told you I wasn’t done.

As you’ve probably seen, conservatives, including President Trump, are being banned on every social media site.

I’ve been fighting back against Big Tech for years, and earlier this month, working with my attorney, Larry Klayman, I filed a petition with the United States Supreme Court over Big Tech discrimination and violations of anti-trust law.

[**Help me keep fighting.**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-409985-963939-5396773-4de7c21d11-7fa8767a05)

My legal battle against the Silicon Valley Big Tech Tyrants is America’s battle. **It’s OUR battle.**

We’ve seen what Facebook, Twitter and Google have done to suppress views contrary to their radical leftist beliefs.

We’ve seen what they’ve done to our elections – including blatant election interference in my race for Congress.

For far too long, these companies have been silencing peaceful political speech in an effort to support the political agenda of the Left.

The massive censorship and cancel culture campaign these companies are currently participating in through an anti-competitive and discriminatory collaboration is primarily being used as tool to target and silence conservatives.

**If we don’t fight them today, they’ll silence all of us tomorrow.**

And I’m not going to stop fighting these tyrants any time soon.

In addition to the petition filed with the Supreme Court this month, I have a team of some of the top attorneys in the nation preparing for the next wave of litigation to finally force Silicon Valley liberals to stop the bias against conservative speech.

[**Help me cover the growing costs of these legal battles by donating here.**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-409985-963939-5396773-4de7c21d11-7fa8767a05)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

body:
The Constitutional right to free speech is dear and sacred for Americans. We can't just sit back and let one of our most fundamental rights erode on our watch.

This is incredibly concerning, Friend.

Conservatives are under attack on social media platforms like Twitter like never before. These big tech companies are silencing our voices and preventing us from speaking directly to the American people!

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New OpEd: "Biden may find support for some proposals among populist Republicans in Congress.
body:
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ac3f1867fc154defac790f2ae879a373&_e=GfWX0A8paHejD5bjVWO2yhal0ZEsxyY8BA-ehfFi3x_73d8YIGHzYFfKPhie4okTAVmWA10KkBHwzry2g8-Jkeahvfn4uwgNpvxeCpnWM2pic_WbxwpFsXbvzNfbDGKeDyM-dEgVsCtpN8i4HqSX2Cl5nQ2ESW09QEB45RXGCLIH6GrI0UNBD9TGwhTVdNRBy20nxw6iYt-2fCYA3td1maWwOVLP9SkxDeMv-PWalMTt9vvAAShLKA8vAH4YGjvRsxYplpnohi72kte-foyPQA%3D%3D) I hope you get a chance to read my latest article on FoxNews.com, "[Biden may find support for some proposals among populist Republicans in Congress.](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ac3f1867fc154defac790f2ae879a373&_e=GfWX0A8paHejD5bjVWO2ykfFqsFCtBhyhJ0SAMVrZtKtnZD5WD_chzDipclWATUZk2gnu6OT690dOnga7UrSDyDT2u7aoxTCEotGvCvtLq1UaxacmtgQluHnvelCcsgvB3gGGfnBApNRU0bBHD2LHalMJvHy1BL_tnr1obB2La_tMsMWJhK1hO2CAsOoSPifNt6gP42bO2Rex4HcuJYyh86DxhR_Syh3eEXf1dVjocEn9wLAbJ07OGb0eY0fN-qiHzubFdlpqqeW5r_6JYU0wDFhTylbae1B0ASJgNE011lsHbENtlnQl5km7WfAjKJpd2_LK9BXE9_qhNqTCa5xgw%3D%3D)" Just as congressional Republicans harnessed the fury of the Tea Party and forced spending caps on President Barack Obama after he spent trillions on economic stimulus measures and ObamaCare, they are now returning from their holiday from fiscal restraint to confront President-elect Joe Biden’s ambitious agenda. Yet, Biden faces a Republican Party transformed by Trump, giving the incoming Democratic president an opportunity to find common ground with the GOP’s populist branch. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did You See What Keith Ellison Just Said?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_what_kei&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I can't believe what I just heard Keith Ellison say in front of Minnesota Legislators. As he was testifying in front of the State Government Finance Committee, Ellison said that he believes the Governor's unilateral executive orders are laws. **Have we really gone so far in these crazy times where our state's top legal officer argues that a Governor can unilaterally create laws? What a Constitutional travesty!** Even more disappointing, is the fact that Ellison was in front of the Committee this morning [arguing for a roughly 8% budget increase](https://www.action4liberty.com/ag_keith_ellison_asks_for_budget?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_what_kei&n=2) for the Attorney General's office. According to him, they have a huge caseload that includes contacting over 900 businesses about compliance with the Governor's orders and suing 12 of them. We have a totalitarian executive regime running our state government. The Minnesota Constitution only gives lawmaking power to the Legislature, but the Governor and Attorney General are making up their own rules. And they are slapping us in the face by asking for a budget increase while attacking our businesses. **It's crystal clear to me that we must remain focused on passing the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution as soon as possible in the Minnesota House. That's the only way we are going to put this to an end!** But Reps Marquart, Pelowski, Sandstede, Lislegard, Sundin and Ecklund betrayed their voters. Last year, with an important election looming, they voted to remove Governor Walz' Emergency Powers when the chance of it passing was small. Now when their vote mattered, they reneged on their promise to their constituents and protected Governor Walz. So Action 4 Liberty is running radio ads in Winona, Moorhead, Hibbing, Virginia, Moose Lake and Cloquet. Here's our ad on Con Artist Julie Sandstede: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/sandstede_radio_ad?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_what_kei&n=3) We also had lit dropping teams the last two weekends and will be sending more out this weekend. By going door to door, business to business, we are able to alert thousands of voters about their legislator's betrayal. This is key if we want to get them voting the right way again. Our team could use more help. If you have a couple hours to spare and are available in the Winona or Moorhead area this weekend, please click on the link below. Our volunteer coordinators will reach out to you.
## [Yes, I Can Help Pass Out Lit This Weekend](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_what_kei&n=4)
### **New Developments From Republicans...**
As we mentioned last week, the betrayal doesn't stop with these six Democrat Con Artists. There's also a significant problem in the Republican ranks. While we are busy getting clean votes on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution and pressuring vulnerable Democrats to do the right thing, Republican and Democrat leadership are behind closed doors, crafting a Fake End Walz' Powers bill. In fact, they even assembled a special committee with Con Artist Gene Pelowski and RINO Kurt Daudt as the leads. The committee is tasked to create a bill, some time in the next couple weeks, to reconfigure Chapter 12 Emergency Powers law. In other words, they are seeking to make Walz' powers permanent. Our organization believes Chapter 12 laws should be ELIMINATED! Here's how you know it's a Fake Bill. Unlike the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution, a bill actually requires the Governor's signature. How good could this bill be if Governor Walz is willing to sign it? Either they'll pass something so pathetic, and irrelevant, or they will waste a month of our time with the false hope that Walz' Powers will be killed, only to watch him veto it in the end. **We asked you to reach out to committee members Reps Marion O'Neill and Barb Haley last week, and I'm happy to report many of you did. Marion went into full crisis mode and accused us of "lying" and "targeting" her. Is she serious?!** Thanks to the research team at NSLA, we can accurately report that both [O'Neill and Haley supported](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=fC4tS59abWPkKoho6fpdBaxgivC3ew34aXVRl71bKPvKyQHaQh1-P0u24Ud0FKjArQvzJYY6KN8iXDUwlrLch8tVf1eOvU41fu1t4wJjP4ego8zoSnj4VRzXWolhUP4fz5QtV7LZfNUSMy4RwT9ZuA&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_what_kei&n=5) the Fake End Walz' Power bill back in November. The legislation kept the Governor's powers in place and would do nothing to stop him from shutting down businesses again. It was so bad, that conservatives like Reps Munson and Drazkowski voted against it. Look for yourself. Here's the bill's language: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=fC4tS59abWPkKoho6fpdBaxgivC3ew34aXVRl71bKPvNVBj9zQjNKrhnP6cK_wGcTpHE7xpE1BJYOfbxsywpgI-9ORLHpuYBoO4GzvxmAOerDRXE-HawdKSU_Xud4rVf&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_see_what_kei&n=6) It's unbelievable that these Republicans would work with Democrats on a bill that the Governor has to sign in the end, when they could join forces with us to bring the heat on these six Democrats to vote the right way on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution and solve the problem now. Rep Haley has gone a step further and told many of you that if the legislature actually votes to End Walz' Emergency Powers, the Governor will just reissue a new set of emergency powers. **Really? Let Governor Walz do that and SUFFER the incredible blowback for such an outrageous move! That would suggest to all of Minnesota that he views the Legislative branch of government to be irrelevant and his power to be supreme. I'm pretty sure that would be the nail in the coffin for impeachment and conviction!** The sad reality is that Action 4 Liberty is working around the clock to pressure these six Democrats who betrayed their voters. When you have the state's top legal officer saying the Governor has the ability to create unilateral laws, we have got to get the legislature to reclaim its power. And we don't need a couple weak-kneed Republicans cutting useless deals with Democrats by crafting a Fake End Walz' Powers Bill. name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m thinking about running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Pennsylvania will be the most important Senate race in 2022. I’m confident we can win if we go for it.
#
Peter,
I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I’m taking a hard look at running to represent Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate.
Pennsylvania will be the most important Senate race in 2022. I’m confident we can win if we go for it. But before we make the call to announce a campaign, I want to get an idea of just how many of you would be with us.
**Will you make a donation today if you want to see us run? You can give here:**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20210119?refcode=em20210119**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/873?t=1&akid=39%2E434096%2EMrET5n)
You already know exactly where I stand. I haven’t had to ‘evolve’ on key issues, because I’ve always said what I believe is true and I’ve stood and worked for the same things for the last 20 years:
* Establish a living wage that is _at least_ $15 an hour
* Pass legislation to ensure health care for all Americans as a fundamental human right indistinguishable from housing, food, and education
* Fight for second chances and reimagine criminal justice reform
* Combat climate change — which is a real, urgent, complicated threat that requires immediate and coordinated action
* Legalize weed nationwide for jobs, justice, veterans, farmers, and revenue
* Fight for the union way of life and our workers
* Protect our LGBTQIA+ communities and continue to push for equal protections under the law

The point is, we have a consistent record to run on. Voters in Pennsylvania know me. They know I’ll always say what I believe. That’s why they elected me as their Lieutenant Governor.
If we run, we’ll build a giant grassroots campaign to fight for **every county, every vote**. Pennsylvania is 67 counties strong and I will continue to be a voice for all Pennsylvanians.
**So, if you are in, please make a donation at this link to let me know:**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20210119?refcode=em20210119**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/873?t=2&akid=39%2E434096%2EMrET5n)
I hope you’ll consider chipping in.
Thank you,
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210119-39-footer&t=3&refcode2=39_434096_MrET5n&akid=39%2E434096%2EMrET5n)**
